
---
title: "Demo: add_two function"
output: html_document
---

This R Markdown demonstrates a simple function that adds two numbers,
split into three chunks: setup, function definition, and example usage.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r define-function}
add_two <- function(a, b) {
	if (!is.numeric(a) || !is.numeric(b)) {
		stop("Both inputs must be numeric")
	}
	a + b
}
# show the function
add_two
```

```{r example-usage}
# Example usage
result <- add_two(2, 3)
print(result)

# Basic tests
stopifnot(add_two(0, 0) == 0)
stopifnot(add_two(-1, 1) == 0)
cat("All tests passed.\n")
```
